fields.label: Aadhaar Number
fields.regexSource: inferred (standard Aadhaar format; not exposed client-side by site)

fields.label: I, the holder of the above Aadhaar, hereby give my consent to Ministry of MSME, Government of India, for using my Aadhaar number as alloted by UIDAI for Udyam Registration. Ministry of MSME, Government of India, have informed me that my aadhaar data will not be stored/shared.

submitButton.label: Validate & Generate OTP
submitButton.mechanism: ASP.NET async postback (WebForm_DoPostBackWithOptions), not a standard form submit

uiFeedbackElements.note: Site shows inline status/error text near the submit button rather than toasts/modals. Worth replicating this placement pattern in the React rebuild for UX fidelity.

elements.purpose: general status message (bold), likely OTP-sent confirmation
primary error message (red, large), likely invalid Aadhaar
secondary error message (red, large), likely OTP mismatch
anchor link (green, bold), appears post-success; possibly links to existing registration lookup - needs live confirmation

steps.title: PAN Verification
steps.scrapedVia: manual DOM inspection + client-side validator JS review

fields.label: Type of Organisation
fields.options: TBD - inspect <option> tags on live site

notes: PAN requirement is conditional on organisation type — org type '1' appears exempt (likely Proprietorship, needs confirmation).
ddlTypeofOrg option values/labels need manual extraction from <select> markup.
ValidateTurnover() and related fields (txtTotalTurnoverA, rblWhetherGstn) belong to a later step, out of scope for this assignment but noted for completeness.
